products.name: Buyer Discovery Experience

interfaces.name: Buyer Web Marketplace
interfaces.description: Browser experience for discovery, messaging, saved searches, and transaction coordination.

interfaces.name: Buyer iOS App
interfaces.description: Native iOS experience for search, alerts, chat, and local transaction coordination.

interfaces.name: Buyer Android App
interfaces.description: Native Android experience aligned to the buyer app feature set.

interfaces.name: Buyer Alerting
interfaces.description: Email and push channels for saved search alerts, replies, and transaction updates.

interfaces.name: SEO Category Entry Points
interfaces.description: Organic search surfaces driving category and local-intent traffic into the marketplace.

neededCapabilities.whyNeeded: Drives entry into local category discovery and personalized return journeys.
